name: Double Frosted Brownies
recipeInstructions:
First layer: Preheat oven to 350°F. Melt chocolate and butter together. Beat eggs and add sugar. Mix well. Stir into chocolate and butter mixture. Mix flour and salt, then blend into the chocolate mixture. Add vanilla and nuts. Spread in a greased 11 by 7-inch glass dish. Bake for 22 minutes and let cool.
Second layer: Cream butter. Combine milk and pudding mix, then add to butter. Gradually stir in powdered sugar. Spread on top of brownie and refrigerate until firm.
Third layer: Melt chocolate chips and butter together over very low heat. When slightly cool, spread over the top and refrigerate.
